headline: Is It Time To Reassess Alliant Energy (LNT) After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Wondering if Alliant Energy's current share price reflects its true worth, or if the recent moves have opened up a better entry point for you? The stock closed at US$68.71, with a 5.9% decline over the last 7 days and a 3.2% decline over 30 days, while still showing a 4.8% gain year to date and a 12.6% return over 1 year. Recent news coverage around Alliant Energy has focused on its role as a regulated utility and how changing sentiment toward utilities can affect perceived stability and...
